summary: This dataset contains multiple financial measures (sale price, units sold, cogs, profit, discounts, gross sales). Revenue has been inferred as 'gross sales' based on semantic matching. ReportGenie AI analyzed 700 rows and found total revenue of 104971922.5. Revenue appears to show latest period growth of 5.15%, and the overall trend direction is upward. Confidence score: 0.53. Duplicate records detected (280) which may inflate KPIs.
